method: Live API/official-source verification: scripts/api_audit/verify_unii.py, scripts/api_audit/verify_cui.py, and official FDA/eCFR source lookup for BSE/prohibited cattle material policy.

black_cherry.decision: Use black_cherry for the FDA/GSRS BLACK CHERRY substance and Prunus serotina botanical identity; remove Prunus avium/sweet-cherry aliases.

dark_sweet_cherry.decision: Add IQM parent for Prunus avium/sweet cherry so sweet-cherry labels remain scoreable without corrupting black_cherry.

bovine_brain_phosphatidylserine.decision: Keep bovine phosphatidylserine bio_score unchanged; model explicit bovine/brain-source concern as active-only watchlist safety signal.

official_sources.title: FDA Announces Final Rule on Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy
official_sources.summary: FDA final rule prohibits defined prohibited cattle materials in human food, dietary supplements, and cosmetics to reduce BSE risk.

official_sources.title: 21 CFR 189.5 Prohibited cattle materials
official_sources.summary: Federal regulation defining prohibited cattle materials for human food, including dietary-supplement context.

official_sources.title: FDA Compliance Program 7321.008 Dietary Supplements
official_sources.summary: FDA inspection program instructs collection of evidence when bovine-derived ingredients may be prohibited cattle material under 21 CFR 189.5(a).

score_policy.coq10: bio_score is strict absorption/form-quality. Crystal-free ubiquinol loses the undocumented clinical-utility exception: 15 -> 13.
score_policy.curcumin: HydroCurc and BCM-95 are capped to the signed enhanced-curcumin ladder: HydroCurc 10 -> 9, BCM-95 10 -> 8.
score_policy.choline: Choline is vitamin-like in the scoring contract and taxonomy canonical sets, not amino_acids; IQM category changed to vitamins.
